title: MineGlade
description: some mods to optimize smp scenarios with friends
body:
# MineGlade

some mods to optimize smp scenarios with friends

## Mods

these are just *some* of the mods included in this modpack.

- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) — Don't render entities that aren't visible
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) — Shaders, make minecraft look pretty
- [Jade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade) (curseforge) — See what you're looking at
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) — OptiFine-esque Dynamic Lights!
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) — Optimize startup speeds
- [Lithuim](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) — Optimize Minecraft in terms of physics, ticks, etc.
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) — Menu to access all mod options
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) — Optimize Minecraft's render engine
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) — Optimize Minecraft's lighting engine
- [Xaero's MiniMap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) (curseforge) — a MiniMap in the top-left of your screen
- [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) (curseforge) — an in-game World Map

### Mods from other platforms

these mods are also in the list above, but sometimes require extra attribution, so are also included in a separate, more discoverable list here.

- [Better Third Person](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person) (curseforge) — Freely look at yourself in third person (but better)
- [Controlling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling) (curseforge) — An easier way of managing your control scheme
- [Jade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade) (curseforge) — See what you're looking at
- [Xaero's MiniMap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) (curseforge) — a MiniMap in the top-left of your screen
- [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) (curseforge) — an in-game World Map

Extensive (full) modlist coming soon.
